👑 Monarch
Docs GitHub
v1.0 — Atomic Design System

Design with
intention.

A premium design system built on Atomic Design principles. Dark-first. Purposeful. Every component crafted to make your product feel like it was built by people who care.

Get Started Browse Components

Atomic Architecture

Atoms → Molecules → Organisms → Templates. Every component is composable, predictable, and purpose-built.

Dark-First

Designed in the dark, perfected in the light. Full theme support with CSS custom properties and seamless transitions.

Tailwind Native

Ships as a Tailwind preset and standalone CSS tokens. Import into any project — framework-agnostic by design.

Built for real products.

Every component is extracted from real Monarch interfaces — dashboards, data tables, agent feeds, and conversational AI.
